heading: Authorization during time of war
label: 1829 Authorization during time of war
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the President, through the Attorney General, may authorize physical searches without a court order under this subchapter to acquire foreign intelligence information for a period not to exceed 15 calendar days following a declaration of war by the Congress.
notes: Effective DateSection effective 90 days after , with exception for certain physical searches approved by the Attorney General to gather foreign intelligence information, see , set out as a note under .Oct. 14, 1994section 807(c) of Pub. L. 103–359section 1821 of this title
